title: Recreate 3 Flyers in Canva
desc: I need someone to recreate 3 flyers using Canva. The project requires rebuilding a total of 4 marketing assets inside Canva from flat PDFs: Three (3) standard flyers at 8.5" x 11" (portrait/single-sided) and one (1) rack card at 4" x 9" (portrait/double-sided). The final deliverables need to be separate files I can easily edit text and update. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and be proficient in Canva. title: Recreate Icon in HD Formats
desc: I already have the original icon—unfortunately it is only low-resolution. I need an exact, pixel-perfect recreation in high definition, keeping every color, line, and proportion identical. No stylistic tweaks; simply a clean, crisp rebuild. Deliverables • PNG, SVG, and JPEG versions, each on a transparent background where applicable • At least 1024 px square for the raster files, with perfect scalability for the SVG • Ready for immediate use in web and print Please include a couple of past icon or logo redraws you have handled so I can see the quality of your vector work. If you can turn this around quickly and match the original flawlessly, let’s get started right away.

Bold typography, balanced white space and colours that complement my existing brand palette are important to me. I’ll provide: • Three approved testimonials with head-shots • Brand colours, logo files (SVG & PNG) and copy for the call-to-action Deliverables I expect: • Editable source file (Adobe InDesign, Illustrator or Photoshop) • Print-ready PDF (300 dpi, CMYK, 3 mm bleed) • Web version (optimised PNG/JPEG, under 1 MB) The job is complete when the flyer is press-ready, renders crisply on mobile and the testimonials take centre stage without overcrowding the design.

desc: I’m refreshing my store’s look and need a set of eye-catching vinyl stickers that will carry our branding consistently across glass doors, counters, product displays, and even the exterior façade. If you routinely prep files for digital printing—complete with bleed, trim marks and cut lines—you’ll feel right at home on this project. Deliverables should include: • Two initial design directions with room for feedback • Final vector artwork (AI/SVG) and a press-ready PDF for each approved size • A simple usage sheet showing placement mock-ups so my installer knows where everything goes Experience with vinyl sticker production is a plus; knowledge of proper lamination recommendations for UV and scratch protection will help my print shop turn these around quickly. title: Wallpaper and cards design

title: White Tiger Tourism Infographic Design
desc: I want a clean, eye-catching infographic that introduces the white Bengal tiger to a general audience and highlights why these animals draw so many visitors to zoos, parks, and reserves. The core narrative is simple: a brief overview of the tiger’s distinctive white coat, a concise size comparison with the standard orange Bengal, and—most importantly—compelling tourist-attraction statistics (visitor numbers, revenue spikes, top viewing locations, or similar metrics you can source). My priority is visual clarity. Bold headings, an easy-to-follow data flow, and a palette that complements the tiger’s white-and-black coloring will keep the piece on brand. I’m open to your preferred design tools—Illustrator, Figma, Canva, or equivalent—so long as the final files include editable source layers plus a ready-to-share PDF and PNG. Deliverable checklist: • 1 full-resolution infographic (print-ready A3 or comparable) • Source file with editable text and graphics • Web-optimized PNG or JPG for quick sharing I’ll supply any brand fonts or logos once we start. Please estimate a realistic turnaround, let me know which data sources you plan to cite for the tourist numbers, and feel free to suggest additional micro-graphics or icons if they strengthen the story.
